kernel_funcs
============

.. py:module:: kernel_funcs


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   kernel_funcs.KernelFactory


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   kernel_funcs.adjust_sigma_n_bound
   kernel_funcs._double_factorial
   kernel_funcs.matern_prefactor


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: adjust_sigma_n_bound(base_bounds, true_noise_std=None, cushion=0.5)

   
   Adjust the log10 bounds of sigma_n based on known noise in the data.
















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: _double_factorial(n: int) -> int

   
   Returns (2n-1)!! for n ≥ 0.  By convention (-1)!! = 1.
















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: matern_prefactor(r, nu, length_scale=1.0)

   
   Evaluate the polynomial prefactor P_p(z) * exp(-z)
   for half‑integer ν = p + 0.5.

   :param r: Pairwise Euclidean distance(s).
   :type r: array_like
   :param nu: Smoothness parameter (must be half‑integer).
   :type nu: float
   :param length_scale: Characteristic length ℓ.
   :type length_scale: float, default 1.0

   :returns: The value of exp(-z) * P_p(z) at each r.
   :rtype: ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!
